text: A photograph of a dilapidated, multi-story building in a residential area. The building on the left has a corrugated metal facade and a blue awning over the ground floor entrance. A man in a blue shirt stands near the entrance. The building on the right is severely damaged, with a collapsed roof and exposed wooden beams and debris. The scene is brightly lit by the sun, which creates a lens flare in the upper left corner.
label: Image
